title: Files should have a newline
description: Files should end with a newlineAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEWhy is this an issue?Some tools work better when files end with a newline.This rule simply generates an issue if it is missing.For example, a Git diff looks like this if the empty line is missing at the end of the file:+class Test { +} \ No newline at end of fileAvailable In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since9.1Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: Files should end with a newline
